records.ety: [Gr. <?/<?/<?/<?/<?/ a means for judging, fr. <?/<?/<?/<?/ decider, judge, fr. <?/<?/<?/<?/<?/ to separate. See Certain.]

defs: A standard of judging; any approved or established rule or test, by which facts, principles opinions, and conduct are tried in forming a correct judgment respecting them.
quotes: Of the diseases of the mind there is no criterion.
Inferences founded on such enduring criteria.
